title: Spanish 900
subtitle: 900 practical Spanish speaking lines with English translations
description: A progressive Spanish speaking course for daily life, errands, social connection, university study, problem solving, and study-abroad confidence in Spain and Latin America.

groups.title: Survival Basics
groups.focus: First contact, names, needs, places, prices, and simple repair phrases for real arrival days.

groups.title: Daily Life and Errands
groups.focus: Varied everyday language for routines, chores, appointments, city tasks, and staying organized.

groups.title: Food, Shopping, and Money
groups.focus: Ordering, groceries, payment, preferences, polite complaints, and everyday money conversations.

groups.title: Housing, City, and Transport
groups.focus: Renting, repairs, neighborhoods, buses, metro, trains, safety, utilities, and moving around confidently.

groups.title: Social Life and Real Conversations
groups.focus: Invitations, opinions, stories, emotions, culture, friendship, and natural small talk that goes beyond survival Spanish.

groups.title: Health, Services, and Problem Solving
groups.focus: Doctors, pharmacies, phones, banks, documents, mistakes, safety, and calm explanations under pressure.

groups.title: University Life and Classes
groups.focus: Enrollment, class routines, professors, group work, deadlines, exams, feedback, and campus services.

groups.title: Academic Discussion and Projects
groups.focus: Seminars, arguments, research, sources, presentations, feedback, writing, and collaborative academic Spanish.

groups.title: Study Abroad, Culture, and Future Plans
groups.focus: Longer, flexible sentences for internships, identity, goals, negotiation, culture shock, and serious conversations abroad.
